ideation: This animation sequence depicts a person running to the right.  The arms will move in opposition to the legs, mimicking a natural running motion. The right arm will be more forward and the left arm more back, to show momentum.  The sequence will focus on the arm movements, assuming the legs are already animated appropriately. The frames will show the arms swinging in a natural arc, slightly elevated from the body to convey the movement's speed and energy. The wrists will remain neutral for a simple, clean animation.

frames.beat: arms swing back and forth, starting the run
arms drive forward and back with powerful momentum
arms settle into a steady running rhythm
